item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Get to know your neighbors
item.description:
Some neighbors are the best, some aren't. You'll never know till you get to know them.
I, myself, have wonderful neighbors and we all look out for each other. I would trust any of them to watch my son if I had to and that is a reassuring feeling.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Images of Note: Solar Panels and trains are cool
item.description:
We all know why.
The deep frying war between Scotland and the South takes a deep fried dark turn.
So fun fact, Eric came in and he was really sad for some reason. we don't know why but I hope he's better now
It's got more fucks than a porno
spin
Brazil's opinion on Acre seems to be "we don't know what's over there and we're too scared to find out.
sel
:)
y e s
do not separate them
one of the few near future predictions that Star Trek makes that isn't war related is that we're going to put solar panels on everything and I think that's very cool and a very good idea.
I will bare that in mind
check up on the funny friend
PAIGE NO
My whole motivation of playing stardew was to save Leo.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: When Allyson Felix became pregnant, Nike was prepared to cut the terms of Felix's endorsement by as much as 70% due to the pregnancy, and told her to “know your place and just run.”
item.description: When Allyson Felix became pregnant, Nike was prepared to cut the terms of Felix's endorsement by as much as 70% due to the pregnancy, and told her to “know your place and just run.” Amid all of this, she was forced to have an emergency c-section seven months into her pregnancy because of a potentially life-threatening condition and her baby had to live for more than a month in the NICU. But two years later she’s qualified for her fifth Olympics with her daughter watching. Felix dropped Nike and created her own brand of running shoes, the Saysh One. She is currently running in the Olympics in Japan wearing them under the banner “I Know My Place”. With 11 medals now, she passed Carl Lewis this summer for the most track and field medals by an American in history! "I used my voice and built this company for you. So that you never have to train at 4:30am while you're 5 months pregnant to hide your pregnancy from your sponsor.” #storytime #learning #consistency #fypviralシ #storytelling #fypシ゚viralシ #nike
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Nimo is ready for the life he deserves
item.description:
Nimo is fresh off the plane from Kuwait and is ready to clean himself up and find a forever home. While in Kuwait he suffered some type of blunt force trauma to his right side causing him to lose vision in his one eye and half of his jaw. This is why his tongue hangs out.
Despite the injury, Nimo will be able to enjoy a great life. He struggles to eat dry food, but he LOVES wet food and eats it easily. He is currently in quarantine to ensure he doesn't have any surprise illnesses and to get neutered. Assuming everything goes well, I'll be taking this adorable boy home to foster and help him glow up. EDIT: I'm located in Northern Virginia with Fancy Cats. Nimo is not ready for adoption yet. I promise I'll let you all know when he is!
item.dc:creator: duq2010

item.title: Have some memes in these trying times
item.description:
Had to run a pizza kitchen by myself
for an entire week, on a college street
Schools out, but the kids were out full force
the worst part is
my manager is my best "friend" of 18 years
he kept me from taking anytime off recently
because he didn't want to work alone
His reasoning is business and personal are separate. It was one of the worst work weeks of my life, and I've been in kitchens for years and drove a cab for 3 years around Atlanta and Chattanooga.
at the house ( we live on a large property together)
I've dealt with microaggressions
not only from him, but now from his maga family
If you've seen my other recent post
I recently came out as trans to the family I live with.
I wanted to be transparent with them
I had hoped that his mom, who was more of a real mom than my own
would be supportive, since I'm not the abomination the news talks about
but rather, someone they have all know for two decades.
Since then, one member of the household has taken it upon herself
to try and blind me with a laser when I'm not looking, as well as teaching the younger kids to ignore pronouns, and dead name me.
and before you say report it to the cops, I live in a town of 2200 people in bumf**k Arkansas
I highly doubt that would end well for me.
I know I have to get out of this state, before things hit the fan next year.
I have reached out to programs that help people in the community move/find houses
but it's not something that happens overnight, and I have my pup, which makes it a bit more difficult.
(my lovely Governor....)
I work my ass off and can barely afford to keep up on rent and utilities here.
savings have been slow to build up, and every time I get something put away, boom some bs to pay for.
I also don't have insurance at the moment
that's a good source of anxiety right there, on top of all the other stuff, as I've got medical issues I need to take care of.
I'm not particularly close with anyone if my actual family
Except my one of my older sisters, whose husband is a cop.
While she's been supportive and tried to remain understanding
she has her own slew of issues with her husband
I'm fairly certain he's abusive, and I've tried to get her to leave him.
I don't expect her to be able to do more than give me encouragement.
I knew this whole process would be hard
But that's a really huge understatement
I'm an autistic, and my anxiety was already pretty high before coming out
But I'm not sure when I'm going to have a moment that I can't pull myself from.
I had someone on my last post suggest setting up a ko-fi
I have never been the person to ask for money
It's always been the other way, with me going into debt to help friends out of bad situations.
I never ask for anything in return, only that they pay it forward. I've lived on the streets enough, and I won't let anyone do the same if it's in my power to prevent.
But I'm slowly losing my sanity, and I need to gtfo of this place asap.
My goal is to get to a blue state with an atp flight school nearby.
I stopped smoking weed a few weeks ago when my egg cracked, and have no urge to do it anymore. (repression is a hell of a thing)
I've always dreamed of being a commercial airline pilot, I was in college in my early 20's for engineering, so it's something that I'm passionate about.
and now that I don't have to medicate with flowers or other substances to feel normal
I can actually make that happen.
I'm trying to take everything one day at a time, and keep my head down. I don't want to put a target on myself here at the house.
I didn't ask to be born this way, but god-damn if I'm not going to be the best version of me.
I hate that I have to tone it down to keep others from starting things with me at the house, but I do get to dress up a bit more when I'm at work.
Complete strangers have been more supportive than a lot of friends/family
When the place you call "home" doesn't feel like it at all,
It really starts to chip away at your mental state.
I don't have any other friends that live close by either.
A lot of my old friends on fb have been supportive,
as a few of them have gone through this themselves in one way or another.
But it still sucks not having an in-person support group.
If you've taken the time to read all this, thank you for the time.
If not, well, I hope you at least enjoyed some of the stolen memes.
I'm going to do my best to continue saving up and looking for a way to escape this hellhole.
If you've put off reaching out to a friend, or you know someone struggling
check in on them, our homies need us, even if they don't vocalize it sometimes. Just reaching out could change someone's whole week for the positive.
"I hope you're proud of yourself for the times you've said "yes," when all it meant was extra work for you and was seemingly helpful only to someone else." -Mr. Rogers
The world could use more people like him right about now, Be kind, and try to remember, you never know what someone is feeling on the inside.
Cat tax - she's begging for my patty melt. I know donations pages don't go over well on here, but I really have no idea what to do other than to keep working my ass off and saving every penny I can. If you can help, my gratitude will be eternal, even if anyone just wants to share it elsewhere. https://ko-fi.com/oliviabastion Edit: I can't even begin to express the surprise and joy I feel at the support I've received, to those who have donated I will try to send each of you a personal thank you, and for everyone being awesome in the comments, keep that s**t up, I absolutely love you all. I'll likely start perusing the Forrest of dank memes, and maybe make a post once or twice a week to give you all some laughs. I know there is another user on here who adds a GoFundMe page to the end of their positivity dumps, and I feel it wouldn't hurt to do the same for others. It's one way right now I can think to help pay it forward, while still getting my situation figured out.
item.dc:creator: transyam

item.title: 8 Ukrainian soldiers held off Russian forces for 70 days near Chasiv Yar, enabling safe withdrawal of hundredsCut off in forest trenches, they survived on drone-dropped supplies
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Unholy Sunday Stolen Dump of Chaotic Memes
item.description:
1. It's going well, I can see
2. The best defense is offense
3. Haters will say this is faked in some way
4. Customer service
5. Yeah, what's up with that?!
6
7. The Grindset is strong here
8. As it was written
9. A happy man
10. What genre would give up to live in a mansion? (Also I'm picturing FBI agent being on you 24/7 and the moment you decided to listen to rap, they kick you out of the mansion)
11. Excuse me sir, but you're in my seat
12. That's how he sleeps
13. Rump shaker
14. To everyone who scrolled trough this dump, you deserve the clapping seal gang
15. And finally I would like to share with you some footage of a wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game that I'm currently developing. If you liked the humor in this dump, I'm pretty sure the game is for you! Here as a full novel that I put in the game that I got a ghost writer to write. It will change the way you look at life and your inner self! Anyway, please wishlist, as small indie devs can't do it without good natured people like you: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
as is tradition
sneaky
it was me. i am now king of france
it all makes sense now
had to say goodbye to my dog a few days ago so until i adopt a kitten it's gonna be rough
must be rich af
we've all been there
what's your favorite dinosaur, gang?
don't drink anymore but i kinda regret never trying absinthe .. does it really have a psychedelic feel to it??
guess i need to get on instagram
don't do that
i think this was an imgurian's OC, can't remember who unfortunately
mmm hmm
i always liked this Silence of the Lambs character
you matter
a true genius
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
